pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-007 (Data Quality) scores 0.405 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Cloud Platform Engineer: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: edge_case) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Cloud Platform Engineer.
